item.title: April 21: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport plays an early set: 7:30pm! Event details at SongKick And if you missed us 4/6 at the Plough, here's what happened when Amy Correia walked in: [youtube=http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hb58YBBr0y4]

item.title: (Too Many) Notification Options
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
Read about upcoming shows right here. Easy right? The trick is knowing in advance when I'll post something... how about I call you (on your rotary-phone land line) and give you a heads-up? Well, that ain't gonna happen, so maybe you want to subscribe to an RSS feed, or try one of the methods below.

Twitter

Subscribe to kicksnarehat2 for notifications for all gigs/bands. This channel is for gigs only -- no "I just at __ for lunch" tweets, I promise.

SongKick

View calendars individually by band on SongKick (when viewing, click "track" to subscribe):
  • Hillbilly Holiday
  • John Powhida International Airport
  • The Vivs
  • The Weisstronauts
Caveat: I'll post an event on SongKick for each show that I'm playing, but SongKick listings don't imply my participation (JPX and the 'Nauts use sub drummers on occasion). Most drummers look the same under in low lighting situations, though, so you may not notice.

Old-School Email Notification

Email whenever I'm playing. Not a listserv, but a manually-maintained list (sent BCC to participants). Being lazy, the message might be a link to a recent posting here, or a SongKick event... who knows? Given the above options, I'll assume any unsubscribe requests are being superceded by the newer technology noted above, so no hard feelings! [contact-form subject="Kick Snare Hat Subscribe" to="kicksnarehat@gmail.com"] [contact-field label="Name" type="name" required="true" /] [contact-field label="Email" type="email" required="true" /] [contact-field label="Action" type="select" required="true" options="Add to Mailing List,Delete from Mailing List,Comment (add below)" /] [contact-field label="Comment" type="textarea" /] [/contact-form]

item.content:encoded: HH will play our first out-of-state show in Saxtons River, VT (SongKick doesn't think that city exists, so it incorrectly lists the venue as being in Bellows Falls). Event Details on SongKick

item.title: May 19: Weisstronauts at the Wollaston Yacht Club
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: A bit of a tease, since this one is only open to club members, but hey, maybe that's you? When you get an offer to play at a Yacht Club, the answer is always Yes. In fact, say Yes to anything with Yacht, Limo, or Private Jet in the title. Event details on SongKick

item.title: May 22: Dinner Jazz set at Stellina Restaurant
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing with the Noteworthy Jazz Ensemble early Tuesday for the dinner set, 6-8:30pm. Event details on SongKick

item.title: June 8: Double-Duty: Hillbilly Holiday & Weisstronauts at Moe's Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: One night, one club, two sets, two bands:  Friday, June 8th with Hillbilly Holiday and The Weisstronauts. Moe's lounge is the recently-opened space under Radio in Union Square. Cover is only $5, and music starts at 9pm. Show/Venue details on SongKick

item.title: June 10: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: June 15: JPX @Vincent's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Look out, Worcester! JPX is headlining, opening, and playing the middle slot. Show details on SongKick

item.title: June 21: 'Nauts @Rosebud & June 22: Vivs @Precinct
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two extra-fun shows this week... Thursday 6/21: The Weisstronauts join multi-media masters The Invisible Rays at The Rosebud. SongKick has the fine print. Friday 6/22: The Vivs re-surface at Precinct with Eddie Japan, The Rationales, and Franc Graham. Vivs set is at 10pm, more details at SongKick.

item.title: July 10: 'Nauts early show @Johnny D's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: It's Johnny D's "Spaghetti Western" night -- $10 admission includes spaghetti dinner (6pm) and music by the Weisstronauts (7:30) and Concrete Rival (8:15). SongKick calendar listing.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Update: We're trading set times with Concrete Rival, who are traveling from out-O-state. Nauts hit it at 7:30pm!

item.title: July 14: JPX @Toad - early set
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport returns to Toad for an early set -- 7:30pm. Free! SongKick

item.title: July 19: JPX @Atwoods & July 20: JPX @Vincent's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two JPX shows this week! Our first show at Atwood's (Cambridge) on Thursday and our second at Vincent's (Worcester) on Friday. SongKick

item.title: It's a Three-Show Week: July 24, 26, & 27
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three very different shows this week, each paired with equally-different food themes: July 24: I'm subbing with the Noteworthy Jazz Ensemble at Stellina's, an excellent Italian restaurant in Watertown Square. 6-8:30pm. July 26: Hillbilly Holiday plays at the Wollaston Yacht Club from 8-10pm. Unlike the last show I played there (with the Weisstronauts), this one's open to the public. Nothing fancy, just a friendly (and kid-friendly) hang on Wollaston beach in Quincy with a spectacular evening view on the covered deck overlooking the water and the Boston skyline. $5 cover and lots of free parking right along the beach. Kenny recommends Tony's Clam Shop, just down the street. Details on Songkick. [Check out Hillbilly Holiday's new EP on BandCamp!] July 27: JPX plays at the Plough and Stars. Music starts at 10:30, but the food -- not sure what to call it, maybe just amazing? -- starts earlier... Details on Songkick.

item.title: August 21: Dinner Jazz set at Stellina Restaurant
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing with the Noteworthy Jazz Ensemble early Tuesday for the dinner set, 6-8:30pm. Event details on SongKick

item.title: August 24: JPX @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport returns to the Plough and Stars! Event details at SongKick

item.title: September 14: The Vivs & Hillbilly Holiday @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Another double-duty evening (luckily at the same club), and an usual pairing too: The Vivs play our first night at Sally O'Brien's in Union Square, with Hillbilly Holiday opening. Sure, there's a "female singers" theme if you're looking for continuity, but musically these bands are quite different -- which is why this is a great bill. Remember when clubs used to stretch a bit more putting acts together? Ah, the good old days... HH opens at 9:30, and The Vivs follow around 11. Details on SongKick.

item.title: September 15: JPX @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport returns to the Plough & Stars for another Saturday night of rock-n-soul with the full "classic" lineup: Peter Moore (Think Tree, Count Zero),  Mike Castellana (Blue Ribbons), Jim Haggarty (Roy Sludge), and of course John Powhida (Rudds) & me (... still can't believe I play with these people). This is a great sounding room, and a fun hang. Show up for dinner, stick around and *please* make some noise! Details on SongKick.

item.title: Sept 22: JPX @Lizard
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: We're thrilled to be on such a great bill Saturday at the Lizard Lounge, sandwiched between Amy Correia and Fireking. Amy sings duet and backup vocals on our most recent recording (unreleased as of this posting), so it shouldn't be too difficult to get her back onstage for our set. Fireking's front-man Anthony Kaczynski and drummer Smitt E. Smitty played in Figures on a Beach a long, long time ago -- before you and I were born -- but strangely they have not aged at all. (If anyone has a copy of their eponymous Sire release stashed away in the attic, you may want to check to see if their photos have greyed and wrinkled.) Details on SongKick.

item.title: Oct 7: JPX @Radio
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Strange Gig Alert: JPX plays to a room full of roller derby dames at Radio this Sunday at 7:00pm. The Boston Derby Dames and PBR want you to help Radio celebrate it's first anniversary derby-style! There will be giveaways, you can arm-wrestle a derby girl, watch derby videos, and of course, check out the 'port. Details on Songkick [ps: don't even bother looking at the club's website -- they can't keep it updated -- just GO, 'cuz this one's gonna be unusual...]

item.title: Oct 19: JPX @Vincents (Worcester)
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Meatball subs? Check. Creepy stuffed animals? Check. JPX? Check! Show details on Songkick.

item.title: Oct 26: Weisstronauts Record Release @Johnny D's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Early show -- 7-9pm! -- celebrating the release of the 'Nauts "Best Of" record. Yup, a record! Heavy vinyl, gatefold jacket, the real deal... and it's bundled with a 27-song CD. Read about it, purchase it online, or even better, pick one up at our show, where we'll perform sides A&B live! The Heygoods play from 7:30-8pm, and the 'Nauts from 8-9. Show details on Songkick

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Oops -- the originally posted times were incorrect! The Heygoods play from 7:30-8pm and the 'Nauts play from 8-9pm. It's *early* folks -- there's a regular evening show at the club after our party!

item.title: Nov 1: JPX @Atwood's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: We're excited to be playing Atwood's again -- it's a cool room with a very good dinner menu and super-nice staff. $5 cover. Music starts around 9:30 there, sometimes a little later, but you really ought to show up earlier and get a seat and have some food! Details on SongKick

item.title: Nov 2: Hillbilly Holiday @The Dockside
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Hillbilly Holiday play a couple of sets at The Dockside restuarant/bar in Malden for Bike to the Sea's 20th Anniversary Gala. It's a party -- there will be games, raffles, prizes, and of course music -- but it ain't private, so come on out! The party starts at 6:30 PM. and HH plays between 7 and 9pm. Details on SongKick

item.title: Nov 10: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: One of my favorite hangs. Great bartenders, cozy atmosphere, free admission! JPX @10, playing a few sets until we get tired or the bar closes. Details on SongKick.

item.title: Nov 15: JPX @Redstar
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: New high-tech multi-medial production company Redstar has an intimate performance space and top-notch gear and staff. They started hosting live events recently, many of which are broadcast. Also on the bill is The Singhs, (fronted by the venue owner), whose members have also played with The Del Fuegos and Francine, to name a couple. (Naming more would make us look bad... we're already nervous about following them.) They're real globe-trotters who don't often play here -- or even the US? -- so catch 'em while you can. 7pm - doors open 8pm - The Daily Pravda 9pm - The Singhs 10pm - JPX Tickets & More Info Details on SongKick.

item.title: Feb 22: JPX @Vincent's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX returns to Worcester & yours truly returns to drums after a few months of shoulder-surgery recovery. See SongKick for Vincent's info. Though I haven't played out since November, I did get to record a song with Amy Correia a few weeks ago, and it's now on BandCamp. Be sure to check out her latest full-length record while you're there. More local shows coming...

item.title: Amy Correia Valentine Single
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: A little bird told me this one deserves its own post: I'm a big fan of Amy Correia, so it was a special treat to play on her recent single, "Hot Dream".  I hadn't heard her before she joined JPX at Q-Division to sing on a few numbers -- one of which was released as a Christmas single (with more to be released in a few months) -- and I was floored by her live show and then by her albums. I highly recommend picking up her latest, "You Go Your Way" (and if you're reading this on Feb 19th, she's playing tonight at the Lizard Lounge).

item.title: Feb 26: Jazz at Stellina's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing with the Noteworthy Jazz Ensemble at Stellina's in Watertown for an early evening set of jazz standards. Seating is mostly for the dinner crowd -- and the food is excellent -- but there are a few seats at the bar if you just want to hang out and listen. Details on Songkick

item.title: Mar 1: Vivs @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Vivs are playing a cozy show Friday at The Plough & Stars with Tad Overbaugh & The Late Arrivals. Vivs start at 10:30, TO&LA an hour later. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Mar 2: JPX @Valentine's, Albany
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX hit J-Po's home town Saturday night for the Dirty Face reunion! Details on SongKick.

item.title: Mar 5: Jazz at Stellina's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing with the Noteworthy Jazz Ensemble at Stellina's in Watertown for an early evening set of jazz standards. The food is excellent, and the music runs from 5:30 to 8:30. Details on Songkick

item.title: Mar 30: JPX @Vincents
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Airport returns to Vincent's, Worcester's coolest bar. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Apr 5: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: FREE show friday, two sets at your favorite friendly neighborhood bar, with Secret Special Guest(s). 10-ish to closing. You're on the guestlist. Details on SongKick.

item.title: May 3 & 4: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two nights of free fun at Toad, with special guest Charles Hansen (Rock Bottom) sitting in Friday  for some unusual covers. UPDATE: Saturday will be LADIES NIGHT, with three special guests: Amy Correia, Andrea Gillis, and Amber Casares. That's alot of singing star-power, people -- not to be missed! Details on Songkick

item.title: May 5: Vivs @Harvard Square Mayfair
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Vivs play a rare afternoon show Sunday -- Cinco de Mayo! -- at the Harvard Square Mayfair, 4pm at the Church Street stage. Fun rock under the sun, food, & kid-friendly activities -- check out the full event schedule!

item.title: May 11: Hillbilly Holiday @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Come shake your hips at the hippest, shaking-est joint in Union Square with Hillbilly Holiday this Saturday. HH starts at 9pm, followed by Zevon Helm and Axemunkee. No cover charge! Details on Songkick

item.title: June 21: Hillbilly Holday @Wollaston Yacht Club
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: HH sways with coastal breeze this Friday, playing two sets at sunset (show starts at 8) on the beautiful covered porch of the friendliest, most-down-home yacht club you'll find: WYC! Details on Songkick.

item.title: July 5: JPX @Lizard Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX plays with A.K.A.C.O.D. tonight at the Lizard Lounge. Tom Janovitz opens (solo), then 2 sets by A.K.A.C.O.D., and JPX closes. We have a special guest tonight -- for one show only -- Jim Gambino (Swinging Steaks) will join us on keys. If you want to catch Monique & crew, go early because it may sell out. Then again, don't be discouraged if it does -- it's likely that many from the Hi-N-Dry fanclub may skip out after their set. If you get turned away early, hang out close by and help us clean up the place later!

item.title: July 12: JPX @Vincents
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Rare TRIO Airport performance -- with J-Po on bass -- tonight at Vincent's, Worcester. Special guests may or may not join us, but either way it'll be a surprise for all since we've never done this before!

item.title: July 20: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX full "Classic" linup returns to Toad! Details on Songkick...

item.title: July 25: Weisstronauts @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Another late notice: The 'Nauts play the Plough & Stars tonight (as I write this) with unknown legends Sool. I believe Sool will start the evening (10pm-ish).

item.title: Aug 18: JPX @Tweed River Music Festival
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Airport makes a quick getway Sunday afternoon, playing at the 2013 Tweed River Music Festival in Stockbridge, VT. Think Woodstock, but smaller, closer, cheaper, and current...

item.title: Sept 13: JPX@Oberon
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Airport lands in Harvard Square friday night playing the Crash Safely MS Benefit with The Upper Crust! 9pm: The Parlour Bells 10pm: John Powhida International Airport 11pm: The Upper Crust (!) 12pm: Videodrome Discotheque The Crash Safely website also has info on discount tickets. Details on Songkick

item.title: Sept 20, 21: JPX Weekend!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Airport plays two shows this weekend: First up, the "classic" lineup reunites Friday at Toad in Cambridge -- no cover! Second, the 'Port lands early Saturday at Valentine's Larkfest Afterparty in Albany, NY! Details on Songkick here and here.

item.title: Sept 27 & 28: Hillbilly Holiday Weekend!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Hillbilly Holiday plays two shows this weekend: Friday at Sally O'Brien's in Somerville, and Saturday at Pleasant Valley Brewing Co. in Saxtons River, VT. This weekend will also be the debut of our newest member Jeff Norcross, whom you may have seen about town with the Weisstronauts,  JJ & Thee Cuban Heels, The Downbeat 5, and The Paula Kelley Orchestra. We're not certain which instrument he'll be playing, because he plays them all. In fact, he may even fire the rest of us and become a one-man, studio-only band -- so don't miss this rare live appearance! Both shows are free, and details are on Songkick (follow the links and/or subscribe to the Songkick calendars if you're feeling techish). (Hey, the post is over! The completely random advertising which may appear below is a new Wordpress unpaid-member "feature".)

item.title: Oct 4: 'Nauts & Hillbilly Holiday @The Plough & Stars
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Last-minute gig alert! The 'Nauts will be playing at the Plough & Stars Friday, and seeing as the line-up is somewhat similar to Hillbilly Holiday, Selena will join in the fun so we can swap in some Hillbilly Holiday action! Rumor has it that George Hall (Kingsly Flood, x-Weisstronauts...) will be joining the Weisstronauts for this show. Go figure. Hope you can make it! Details on Songkick.

item.title: Oct 20: Hillbilly Holiday @WPO "3rd Sundays @3"
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Hillbilly Holiday hits the big stage with the Waltham Philharmonic Orchestra's "3rd Sundays @3" series: a mid-afternoon, family-friendly, free show! 3-4pm. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Oct 25: Booty Vortex @C-Note
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Playing a one-off early halloween gig in Hull (that's a "u") with dance band Booty Vortex. Really fun material, great singers, and yes, I'm learning 33 songs for a single show... what was I thinking? Details on Songkick

item.title: Nov 7: Double-gig night! Bertrand Laurence & Hillbilly Holiday
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Thursday is double-duty night! First up, an unusual event at Goorin Bros., the hat shop on Newbury Street, with an early show by the Bertrand Laurence Quartet (aka "Menage A Quatre") playing musettes and blues. Finger-style acoustic guitar, accordion, clarinet & brushwork starts shortly after 5 and ends around 9pm, with breaks for arm-wrestling somewhere in-between. FREE. Details on Songkick. Later the same evening...  (say, eleven?) Hillbilly Holiday hits the stage in Somerville at Radio. The Darlings and the Phil Aiken Army play earlier if you're the stay-in-one-place type. Details on Songkick. Hope to see you at one or the other!

item.title: Dec 4: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: It's been over 2 months since our last gig, but enough! The JPX full "Classic" linup returns to Toad on Wednesday. No Cover! Details on Songkick...

item.title: Dec 12: Weisstronauts @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The first of two 'Nauts Holiday Jubilees this year* is at the Plough & Stars, with music starting at 10. (Of course, dinner is recommended if you like eating excellent food prepared by other people.) Tradition dictates these annual events occur in a new venue with new guest bands each year, along with a heavy helping of holiday-themed (possibly even sung) numbers. Our Holiday Stenographer was asleep at the keyboard when this first gig was booked, though,  so we'll be hogging the stage for this not-so-silent-night. A few songs will get the mangled-lyric treatment, but the rumor mill is already churning and bubbling and doing whatever rumor mills do when they find out who might jump up on stage and grab the mic.  Very limited details of which are available on Songkick. * this year's second Jubilee is 12/21 at the Midway Cafe; sadly I won't be there!

item.title: Jan 12: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Sunday Early Bird Special: 2 helpings of The John Powhida International Airport at Toad, Cambridge. 8pm, FREE. Details on Songkick

item.title: Jan 17: Hillbilly Holiday & JPX
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Double-duty night! Catch a rare long set by Hillbilly Holiday at Sally O'Brien's at 9:30, then race across town for The John Powhida International Airport at Midway for Joe Egan's Birthday Bash! After some initial confusion we're fairly certain it's this Joe Egan -- not that Joe Egan -- but just in case we've prepared forty-five minutes worth of appropriate covers.

item.title: Jan 25: JPX @Toad Early (7:30)
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: UPDATE: we're on the early slot, 7:30 - 10pm! JPX returns to Toad with a Secret Special Guest for some free love (no cover!) this Saturday. Details on Songkick. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x5y0ska8lvM

item.title: Feb 27: Weisstronauts @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Last-minute show! Weisstronauts at the Plough and Stars. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Mar 5: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Another last-minute show: John Powhida International Airport plays two sets at Toad, this Wednesday, March 5th, starting at 10pm. No cover charge!

item.title: Mar 21: The Vivs @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Vivs -- now with 10% more "Tribe" -- make a rare out-of-basement appearance Friday, March 21st at Toad. Show starts at 10pm. Free! Details on Songkick.

item.title: Apr 16: Hillbilly Holiday on WMFO
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Billies play On The Town at 10:30pm, listen on the dial or on the interweb.

item.title: Apr 26: Hillbilly Holiday @Sally O'Brien's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Looking for somethin' fun on a Saturday Night? Hey, it's not too late! Hillbilly Holiday & The Darlings -- a fabulous country outfit with another golden-throated singing couple -- will be trading sets at Sally O'Brien's. Only five bucks to get in one of the friendliest bars in town.

item.title: May 13: Weisstronauts Mini-Tour Kickoff @Armory Sound
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
Reads like we're touring in a mini, doesn't it? Actually it's just a short tour down to NC and back, starting with a free event at Armory Sound. Here's the entire run-down:

Tuesday May 13, 2014: Armory Sound, formerly Hi-N-Dry, Somerville MA

A special, intimate "tour kickoff" on our home turf.  Early show, 7pm.  This is a special edition of Armory Sound Live Series --  we'll be professionally recording this set for possible release.

Wednesday May 14, 2014: 68 Jay Street Bar, Brooklyn NY

We're excited to play this very cool new-ish venue with our pal Jack Grace and his cast of musical cohorts!

Thursday May 15, 2014, Rodeo Bar, New York NY

Always happy to return to the Rodeo Bar.  We'll be playing two sets of instrumental twang, surf, rock, and psychedelia.  No cover at the Rodeo!

Friday May 16, 2014, Treehouse Lounge, Washington DC

Early set!  We start the evening off at 7pm and are followed by our pals the Jelly Roll Mortals and then Gramophonic, the Federal Hillbillies and See Rule Five.

Satuday May 17, 2014: MotorCo, Durham NC

A 4pm matinee appearance, as part of the annual INSTRO SUMMIT -- the world's biggest instrumental rock festival!

Monday May 19, 2014: Armory Sound, formerly Hi-N-Dry, Somerville MA

Yes, we are "bookending" this tour!  A special, intimate "tour wrap-up" on our home turf.  Early show, 7pm.  This is a special edition of Armory Sound Live Series --  we'll be professionally recording this set for possible release.

Friday May 23, 2014, Pleasant Valley Brewing, Saxtons River VT

Two sets at our fave Vermont venue!  Great food and drink here... Music goes from 8pm-10:30pm, no cover.

item.title: Airport Life!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
The latest JPX release is finally here!
[embed]http://johnpowhidainternationalairport.bandcamp.com/[/embed]
I'll send out another post later this month announcing the record-release show, but 'till then you can listen online.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content:
Nate,
Thanks for the heads-up. I already bought the cd from bandcamp. Awesome!
Rainer
Sent from my iPhone
Please excuse brevity and typos.
>

item.title: June 21: JPX Record Release @Lizard Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Come see us perform the entirety of Airport Life along with special guests Schooltree and Mike Gent at the Lizard Lounge in Cambridge. Doors at 8:30, show starts at 9:15. $10/$12-day-of-show. Advance tix available at brownpapertickets & details at SongKick. Hope you can make it!

item.title: July 16: Hillbilly Holiday @The Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: HH returns to the Plough for a Wednesday Night no-cover smash. Come early for some fine food. Details on Songkick.

item.title: July 18: JPX @Atwoods Tavern
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: July 29: JPX-duo @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John & Nate play a special who-knows-what'll-happen night at Toad. 10pm & Free! Show details on Songkick.

item.title: Aug 12: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX returns to Toad with the full-band lineup this Tuesday, augmented with special guest vocalist Amber Casares! Music starts at 10 -- no cover. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Aug 23: Weisstronauts @Gulu Gulu Cafe, Salem
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: This Saturday the 'Nauts make a rare appearance in Salem at the ultra-cool Gulu-Gulu Cafe for a low-volume, high-octane party... and, boy does the food look good. No cover, music roughly from 9-midnight. Details on Songkick.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Yeah... this was a post I'd configured to "auto-publish". Didn't work exactly as intended. Hope you didn't miss the show :)

item.title: Aug 26: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: JPX full lineup, 10pm at Toad tonight -- FREE! Details on Songkick.

item.title: Sept 5: Jack Grace & Hillbilly Holiday @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: It's a two-fer night... I'll be playing with both Hillbilly Holiday and with New-York artist Jack Grace. Jack is a force of nature -- a strange one, and very entertaining. He's sung duets with Norah Jones, played on soundtracks alongside .38 Special, and Jerry Lee Lewis described him as "like that Cash kid, but good." I'll also be playing with Jack the following day (Sept. 6) at the WMRW Bash in Warren, VT. Details, as per usual, on Songkick.

item.title: Aug 29: Weisstronauts @Midway Cafe
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Nauts are crossing the bridge Friday, playing the Old Soldier's record release at the Midway along with Axemunkee and a rare live performance by studio wonders The Elderly. I'm gonna feel cool by association. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Sept 26: Barnies Reunion / Pipeline Anniversary!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: All you cool kids probably already know about the Pipeline 25th Anniversary shows, but just a heads-up if you're interested in catching the Barnies Reunion at the Regent Theater: you may want to buy tickets ahead of time. If you never saw the band live (there have been only two reunions in two decades), have a listen: [bandcamp width=400 height=120 album=1771114797 size=large bgcol=ffffff linkcol=de270f tracklist=false artwork=small] The Barnies will be opening the night at 7:30 pm sharp! (doors at 7), which will also feature Dumptruck, Vapors of Morphine, and Bill Goffrier (Big Dipper).

item.title: Sept 6: Jack Grace Band @WMRW Bash
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Jack Grace Band plays the WMRW Community Bash concert in Warren, VT. Details at http://www.wmrw.org/

item.title: Sept 7: Vivs @Somerville Block Party
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
Join the Vivs for a free afternoon outdoor party this Sunday, 2-3:30, at the Somerville Block Party in Teele Square. If you're driving, note no meters or residential restrictions apply on Sunday, but Holland Street will be blocked off between Davis and Teele Square (where the Vivs will be playing).
Event Details: http://www.somervilleartscouncil.org/node/1522
(For anyone keeping score, this will be show #4 this weekend... hope you can make it to at least one!)

item.title: Sept 12: Vivs @Store 54
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Vivs play tonight at Store 54 -- a very cool & unusual venue if you haven't been already (vintage clothing & record store with a decent stage). My JPX bandmate Pete Moore is also on the bill with his amazing band Count Zero, and the Uranium Daughters open at 9pm. Details on Songkick. And now, Peter would like to sing a Beck song for you: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0MF0jXC9KzA

item.title: Sept 25: Amber @Tavern at the End of the World
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Amber Casares has a new band that I'm honored to be playing in, alongside with fellow JPX'er Mike Castellana on guitar, fellow Blue-Ribbon James Rohr on keys, and ace-bassist Marc Hickox (who you've likely seen playing in nearly every other band in Boston). We'll be debuting Thursday at Tavern at the End of the World, opening for The Natalie Flanagan Band. Hope to see you there! Details on Songkick

item.title: Sept 26: Barnies Reunion (!) & Jack Grace Band
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: This Friday will be another two-fer night. First up, the big Barnies Reunion I mentioned before  at the Regent. NOTE: this is an EARLY show: doors open at 7pm and we're on at 7:30 sharp! Immediately after I'm scooting accross town with to play with NYC's Jack Grace Band, 9:30 at Atwood's Tavern, opening for the Tim Gearin Band. [bandcamp width=400 height=120 album=1771114797 size=large bgcol=ffffff linkcol=de270f tracklist=false artwork=small]

item.title: Sept 27: Jack Grace Band @Hostel Tevere
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Jack Grace Band plays the SIPtepberfest after-party in Warren, VT at Hostel Tevere, 5pm. It's a beer festival, get it?

item.title: Oct 1st-18th: Van Hayride / Puss N Boots
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Heading out for a 2+ week tour with Van Hayride, opening for Puss-N-Boots (Norah Jones, Sasha Dobson, & Catherine Popper). No Boston shows, but we'll be in Pawtucket, RI on the 16th at The Met. More info: Jack Grace Band ("Mr." Van Hayride) Puss N Boots

item.title: Oct 23rd: Hillbilly Holiday @Gulu Gulu Cafe, Salem
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Hillbilly Holiday kicks it up this Thursday at Gulu Gulu Cafe in Salem ("best beer list" & "best cafe" - North Shore Magazine). 9pm-midnight, free! Details on Songkick [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=295664815 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=1825316104]

item.title: Oct 30th: Weisstronauts @Aeronaut Brewing Company
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Nauts play for the cool kids at Aeronaut Brewing Company thursday w/ Spacecramp & The Surf Riders. Doors at 7pm, Nauts at 9pm. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Nov 1st: Barnies Reunion @TTs!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: WTF, we learned all those songs for the Pipeline reunion... let's play another one! Besides, Ed asked nicely, and it's The Gravel Pit's record release. Scott Janovitz and Mike Gent's Rapid Shave open. Details on Songkick, and here's something to get you going: [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=1771114797 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=3306834547]

wp:comment.wp:comment_content:
Extremely sad I will be out of town for this. j
Jon Lupfer Q Division 363 Highland Ave. Somerville MA 02144 617.625.9900 ext. 101 jlupfer@qdivision.com http://www.qdivision.com
Wait, maybe we should cancel?? You'll be missed!

item.title: Nov 6th - 8th: Jack Grace, Hillbilly Holiday
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three shows this weekend! The Jack Grace Band plays Thursday 11/6 at The Gardner Ale House in Gardner, MA & Friday 11/7 at The Hollywood Casino in Bangor, ME. Saturday night Hillbilly Holiday plays at Pleasant Valley Brewing in Saxtons River, VT.

item.title: Nov 11th: Jazz at Stellina's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing in the jazz quartet at Stellina's, Watertown tomorrow, Nov. 11th. No cover, excellent food. 5:30-8:30pm.

item.title: Nov. 12th: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport returns to Toad at 10pm Wednesday night. No cover charge! Details on Songkick. BTW, you can vote for us in the Boston Music Awards... [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=2830744941 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=2145963424]

item.title: Nov 20th: Junky Love @Tavern at the End of the World
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: 2nd gig w/ Amber Casares, James Rohr, Marc Hickox & fellow-JPXer Mike Castellana -- now dubbed "Junky Love". Opening for Natalie Flanagan thursday night at the (suitably-named?) Tavern at the End of the World. Details on Songkick

item.title: Nov 28th: JPX at Vincent's, Worcester
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Friday post-Thanksgiving cool-down at Worcester's hippest/only scary-stuffed-animals bar, with special guest Jef Charland (Blue Ribbons) on bass. Details on Songkick. [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=2830744941 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=2702092512]

item.title: Dec 5th: Vivs, 'Nauts @Plough & Stars
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Another two-fer night: The Vivs make a rare appearance with special guests The Weisstronauts this Friday, 12/5, at the Plough & Stars. The Vivs start 10-ish. Great food if you can make it earlier, and a fun hang either way. Details on Songkick. And now, Karen wants to sing for you: [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=3442247600 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff artwork=none track=3092553732]

item.title: Dec 12th: JPX @Vincent's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport lands tonight at Vincent's in Worcester. Special guest bassist Jef Charland will join us again on stand-up. No cover charge!

item.title: Dec 13th: Weisstronauts Holiday Jubilee @Store 54
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Come join the Weisstronauts for our 16th-annual Holiday Jubilee at Store 54 in Allston. Special guests this year are David Champagne (The Heygoods, Treat Her Right) and Jack Grace. Donation cover, and BYOB! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6ILGzSOghTI

item.title: Dec 14th: JPX @Boston Music Awards
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport play this year's BMAs supporting our nomination for Best Song "Cover Me, I'm Going For Milk". The ceremony is at the Revere Hotel  (on Boston Common); we're on the Studio 57 Stage at 10:45pm. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bjoqlT0s3wY

item.title: Dec 19th: Junky Love @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Junky Love plays tonight at Sally O's in Somerville, opening for the Trick Wallace Trio (a.k.a. Patrick from Amber Casares's excellent country combo). 10pm, $5 cover. Details on Songkick.

item.title: Dec 23rd: Jazz at Stellina's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Subbing in the jazz quartet at Stellina's, Watertown Tuesday, Dec. 23rd. No cover, excellent food. 5:30-8:30pm.

item.title: New Year's Eve: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Serious fun at Cambridge's coolest, playin' all night -- music starts at 9pm. No cover!

item.title: Jan 4th: JPX @Midway Cafe
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport joins Fireking for their Midway Cafe residency tonight, with Fireking front-man Anthony Kaczynski joining JPX on bass. FYI, both Anthony and drummer Smitt E. Smitty were in Figures On A Beach back in the day... Details on Songkick.

item.title: Jan 14th: JPX @Lizard w/ Liza Colby Sound
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: We're excited to play w/ The Liza Colby Sound this Wednesday at the Lizard Lounge, where we expect to be blown off the stage. Be there to witness it!

item.title: Jan 30th: Weisstronauts @Sally O'Brien's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: We're pleased to share the stage with the wonderful Ray Mason Band and The New Million Box this Friday at Sally O'Brien's. NMB opens at 9, followed by Ray, then 'Nauts. Hope you can make it! Details on Songkick

item.title: Feb 13th: Weisstronauts @Atwoods
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: We're very excited to play Atwood's Tavern this Friday opening for the unbelievably groovy Tim Gearan band. Let's be done with the snow and have some fun, okay? Details on Songkick.

item.title: Mar 4th: Weisstronauts @Rosebud
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Nauts are playing our first show at the Rosebud since it's re-opened for music. 10pm 'till whenever, but come earlier if you'd like some fine food. Details on Songkick

item.title: Mar 9th: Weisstronauts @Cuisine En Locale
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Monday Night is Taco Night (yes, Virginia, Monday) at Somerville's excellent restaurant/music-venue. Come join the fun with The 'Nauts and Tsunami of Sound. Early show: 'Nauts at 8pm. Details on Songkick

item.title: Mar 13th: JPX @Atwoods
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport lands at Atwoods tonight -- early show (9pm), opening for the amazing Tim Gearan Band (10pm). Get there early if you like excellent food. Details on Songkick

item.title: Mar 18th-21st: Jack Grace, Hillbilly Holiday, Weisstronauts
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Six shows in four days this coming week, but I'll hilight the local (Cambridge/Somerville) event first, at which I'll be backing three bands, Jack Grace (from NY), The Weisstronauts & Hillbilly Holiday all play at Sally O'Brien's on Thursday, 4/18. Show starts at 9pm, no cover charge! Details on Songkick I'll also be playing with Jack on the "sandwich days", Wednesday at Norey's (Newport RI) & Friday at Strange Brew (Manchester, NH). Hillbilly Holiday will also play Saturday at Pleasant Valley Brewing (Saxton's River, VT), a favorite hangout we frequent when we head up to record at Verdant (run by Pete "Puts-the-Weiss-in-Weisstronauts"), this time to wrap-up our first full-length record.

item.title: Apr 1st & 2nd: Weisstronauts, Junky Love
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Correction: 4/1 showtime is 8:30 pm Two fun shows this week, starting with The Weisstronauts at TT The Bear's on April 1st. It's an early one -- we're on at 8:30 (yay!), followed by (in order) Leah & Her J Walkers, Matt Heaton & The Electric Heaters, and The Skeleton Beats. If you haven't seen Captain Pete in a while, c'mon out and say hello (that's him waving below)! Thursday April 2nd, Junky Love (featuring Amber Casares) revisit the aptly-named Tavern at The End of the World (it's closer than you think) for a mid-slot set between Natalie Flanagan and The Natalie Flanagan Band.

item.title: May 9th: JPX @Toad, 7pm
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport plays an early & FREE show Saturday, 7pm at Toad, Cambridge. Two quicks sets and we're out. Hope you can make it. Details on Songkick.

item.title: May 23rd: JPX @Toad, 7pm
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport returns to Toad for another early/free set. Jim Haggerty is still recouping, so tonight Mr. JPO himself will play bass, and it we will rock you. Songkick [bandcamp width=100% height=120 album=2830744941 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff tracklist=false artwork=small track=2145963424]

item.title: May 27th-30th: Weisstronauts mini-tour
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Weisstronauts kick off a mini-tour tonight, May 27th,  with an early show at Cuisine en Locale in Somerville (7:30pm). It's a foodie bar (hence the name), and the food is very good. We'll be literally playing for our supper. Here's the rest of the schedule: Thursday May 28, 2015 Pleasant Valley Brewing Saxtons River VT 8pm till 10:30pm.  No cover, great food and tap selection. Friday May 29, 2015 B Side Ballroom & Supper Club Oneonta NY This will be our first time playing the B Side, though Pete & Nate played last year, as part of Jack Grace's band and LOVED the venue. Ridiculously good food, drink, vibe, sound... They care deeply about music here. Saturday May 30, 2015 Spring Street Gallery Saratoga Springs NY With Greg DeLuis opening at 8pm. Weisstro-time: 9pm-11pm. NOTE: the 'Nauts will continue the mini-tour with a second leg June 3rd-7th, though I'm not playing those dates. You can find out more details at the Weissy site.

item.title: June 20th & 21st: JPX & Weisstronauts
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three free (!) shows this weekend, beginning Saturday 6/20 afternoon when John Powhida International Airport plays the Arlington Alive Summer Arts Block Party. Fun in the sun starts at 4pm. Later that evening The Weisstronauts play Aeronaut Brewing Company in Somerville, around 9:30pm. (I seem to remember a good Taco Truck parked in the lot for events there.) On Sunday 6/21, The 'Nauts play at The Les Paul Big Sound Experience music festival. Weisstro-time is 4:30 sharp on the Les Paul Stage. Note set times are only 30 minutes, so if you don't like what you hear, rest easy 'cuz it'll be over soon. In addition to the 9 bands playing, there's a mobile Les Paul museum exhibit. [bandcamp width=100% height=120 album=3891112373 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff tracklist=false artwork=small track=4133397609]

item.title: June 23rd: JP-not-X @Lizard Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Last-minute gig tonight at The Lizard Lounge w/ John Powhida & Friends, featuring some heavy-hitter guests playing all-covers, off-the-cuff. (Likely: Hall & Oats, Cheap Trick, ELO, Bowie, Lulu, Rundgren, Zevon, and Prince, plus whatever stump-the-band tricks he pulls out of his... hat). Fun starts at 9pm, doors at 8:30.

item.title: July 13: JPX @Great Scott
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport play Monday at Great Scott opening for The Ike Reilly Assassination (J-Po is a big fan). Details on Songkick. Look now, Ike would like to sing a song for you: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VF2hTALUl-I

item.title: July 19th: Q-Division benefit for Jim Haggerty
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida and The Not Band play at fundraiser for Jim "Bionic" Haggerty at Q-Division Studios Sunday at 8:30pm. Come earlier, it's an all day party...

item.title: July 20th: Jules Verdone @TTs Farewell Blowout
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Jules Verdone is making the trip for Monday's TT The Bear's Blowout Week show, and Ed Valauskas and I will be "driving the bus" -- sorry, no Avram! -- along with Brendan Haley, Dean Falcone, and Vivs starlet Karen Harris. 9:30pm.

item.title: July 24th: Hillbilly Holiday @Pleasant Valley Brewing
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: HH returns to Pleasant Valley Brewing in VT -- one of our favorite places -- great food, friendly bartenders, no cover charge! [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=295664815 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=1825316104]

item.title: July 26th: Weisstronauts @Harpoon BBQ Festival
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Barbecue. Do I need to type anything else? Maybe a link? The 'Nauts will play -- and most importantly, eat -- at this year's Harpoon Barbecue festival in Windsor, VT, from 1-2:30pm on Sunday. Plenty of room at the picnic table. [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=3891112373 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=2489797278]

item.title: Aug 27th-29th: Junky Love, Hillbilly Holiday, JPX
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: It's a three-show weekend, starting Thursday w/ Junky Love at Tavern at the End of the World, opening for Natalie Flanagan. No cover, showtime is 10pm. Friday night Hillbilly Holiday plays at Gulu-Gulu in Salem, MA, no cover, set starts at 9. On Saturday, John Powhida International Airport returns to Toad & the fabulous Jim Haggerty returns on bass (with his new titanium shoulder). Show starts at 10pm, and again, no cover charge!

item.title: Oct 2nd, 3rd: Weisstronauts @Bull McCabe's, Harpoon Octoberfest
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two 'Nauts shows this weekend, starting Friday with our first show at Bull McCabe's in Somerville, and then Saturday afternoon at the annual Boston Harpoon Brewery October Festival (we're on early -- 1pm). Hope to see you there!

item.title: Oct 16th, 17th: Weisstronauts, JPX, Junky Love
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three gigs this weekend: Friday begins early (9pm) with the Weisstronauts at Sally O'Brien's with Answerman and Tsunami of Sound. At 10:30 John Powhida International Airport play Toad 'till closing. Note we're playing after Shreveport, Louisiana's Seratones, who I'm sad to be missing (bandcamp tune below). And the coolness of Vincent's in Worcester will host Junky Love on Saturday night. Have fun & wear earplugs! [bandcamp width=350 height=442 track=3238660238 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff tracklist=false]

item.title: Oct 29th: Weisstronauts w/ Francine @Atwoods Tavern
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
The 'Nauts are thrilled to play with one of our favorite bands ever -- Francine! -- now featuring 'Naut Kenny on Keys, at Atwoods Tavern this Thursday. Francine at 10pm, 'Nauts at 11pm, but show up early because the food is great and the staff are friendly.
And now, Clayton & his pal Aimee would like to sing you a song from 1993 ('cuz I couldn't find a Francine stream):
https://youtu.be/GT_W9W2depE

item.title: Oct 29th - Nov 1st: Weisstronauts Free Halloween EP
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: For a limited time only -- just a few days! -- our fearful leader Pete Weiss has posted a free Halloween EP on Bandcamp, three songs recorded live at the Armory Sound 2013 Halloween Party. Just click the "download" link and put "$0" as the name-your-price amount. Really, it's okay -- our Halloween gift to you! Pete promises he'll take it down sometime on Nov 1st, so snooze and you'll lose. [TOO LATE!] ... and you can see the 'Nauts Thursday, Oct 29th at Atwoods Tavern with Francine. Hey, two announcements for the same event! Usually I forget to post, so this makes up for that a bit.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: “Fearful leader” !! Hit the nail on the head...
Word selection was heavily influenced by the holiday...

item.title: Nov 5th-7th: Weisstronauts Weekend
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Nauts are heading out for a 3-hour day tour, starting Thursday 11/5 at Pleasant Valley Brewing, an amazing cozy & friendly venue in Saxton's River, VT. If you're anywhere nearby, you probably know the place. Friday 11/6 we return to Flagship Brewing Company in Staten Island, NY. Short walk from the Ferry terminal, & the ferry runs 24/7. Saturday 11/7 we're at the Mobtown Ballroom in Baltimore, MD, opening for Caleb Stine & the Brakemen for their album release (recorded at Verdant, Pete's VT studio). https://youtu.be/XXYmdC4HZgc

item.title: The Vivs: Odds
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Viv's latest recording, "Odds", is now available online at the usual places -- iTunes, Amazon, & cdbaby -- and hard copies will also be available at an as-yet-unscheduled record release show. https://youtu.be/o_NgavzsRt8

item.title: Nov 12th: Weisstronauts @Aeronaut Brewing
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Weisstrnauts return to Aeronaut Brewing Company for an early show Thursday at 7pm, featuring special guest visual/installation/hula-hoop artist Melissa Winter Weiss! https://scontent-lga3-1.cdninstagram.com/hphotos-xtp1/t51.2885-15/e35/11910517_416592701865986_1709165720_n.jpg

item.title: Nov 14th: JPX & Rock Bottom @Midway Café
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Saturday night is Big Rock Night at the Midway Café, starting at 9:30 with John Powhida Internation Airport and then two sets by Rock Bottom! You've been warned... [bandcamp width=100% height=120 album=2830744941 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff tracklist=false artwork=small track=460800019]

item.title: Dec 9th: Junky Love @Midway
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Junky Love hit the Midway Cafe on Wednesday with Old Soldiers and The Hi-End. $5 cover, 9pm set!

item.title: Dec 11th-13th: Weisstronauts, JPX, Hillbilly Holiday
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three (or four) shows this weekend! First up, The 'Nauts play with Vapors of Morphine tonight (12/11) at the Armory in Somerville at 8pm. Saturday, 12/12 John Powhida International Airport plays Store 54 in Allston with Fireking. Sunday afternoon Hillbilly Holiday plays Aeronaut Brewing Co in Somerville. For anyone heading out the the Q-Division party on Friday, I also may be playing with a rag-tag version of JPX if I can make it there in time from the Armory show (just down the street). If you're there instead of at VOM/Armory, note that John will be playing either way, solo at least!

item.title: Dec 16th-19th: Jack Grace @Toad, etc
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: I'm playing a string of shows with NYC artist Jack Grace this week -- including one here in Cambridge on Friday, 12/18 at Toad. Jack is a serious entertainer and talented songwriter who's collaborated with Norah Jones and penned songs for feature films... and he's weird, people. Good weird. He doesn't come to the Boston area much, so if you're on the fence, hop on over. We're also playing Norey's in Newport, RI on Wednesday, 12/16 and Strange Brew Tavern in Manchester, NH on 12/19. [soundcloud url="https://api.soundcloud.com/tracks/209754983" params="color=ff5500&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false" width="100%" height="166" iframe="true" /]

item.title: Jan 7th: Martha Bourne @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Playing an early set at Toad w/ Martha Bourne, Mike Castellana & Ed Lucie. 7:30pm, no cover charge! [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=3525649830 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=1737076181]

item.title: Jan 14th: JPX @Lizard Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport plays tonight at the Lizard Lounge w/ one of my personal favorite bands -- Francine! Field Day opens. A pleasant time is guaranteed for all! https://youtu.be/q_1Sv0qpW7Y

item.title: Jan 21st: Martha Bourne @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Early set tonight with Martha Bourne at Toad -- 7:30pm, no cover charge! [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=3525649830 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=3019172051]

item.title: Jan 23rd: Junky Love @Vincent's, Worcester
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Junk Love are gonna hit hard tonight at the coolest/strangest little hide-away in New England's second-largest city. Come see Amber Casares melt the faces off the unsuspecting crowd! No shirts, no shoes, no cover.

item.title: Feb 10th & 11th: Jack Grace @Norey's & @Lizard Lounge
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two shows with Jack Grace this week: Wednesday at Norey's in Newport, RI & Thursday at The Lizard Lounge with The Chandler Travis Philharmonic. Hope to see ya! [soundcloud url="https://api.soundcloud.com/tracks/23279171" params="color=ff5500&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false" width="100%" height="166" iframe="true" /]

item.title: Feb 13th: Junky Love @Vincent's, Worcester
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: It's the weekend of love, and Junky Love loves Vincent's. So come on out Saturday night and listen to our songs of pain and suffering in the wonderful taxidermy-lined confines of Worcester's Friendliest Bar. Music starts around 10. No cover charge!

item.title: Feb 26th: Three-Band Extravaganza @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Friday at Sally O'Brien's I'll be playing with three different bands at an open-to-the-public birthday party (Hi Roberta!), with all material requested by the celebrant. The night opens with an Vivs/Kinks mashup and food (headbangers and mash?) while it lasts, followed by Al Janik's "Almanals" (seriously) belting out all Animals, and finally Mick Mondo & Streaker closing with Roberta's favorite Bowie tunes. A pleasant time is guaranteed for all.

item.title: Mar 13th: St . Stosh's Polka Slosh @Aeronaut Brewing
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: If you wait long enough, everything happens: this will be my first polka gig. Saint Stosh's Polka Slosh, featuring Al Janik, Michael McGlaughlin, Pete Sutton, and Mark Chenevert, play this Sunday at Aeronaut Brewing. It's an accordion-themed event of sorts, and we'll be doing a short set somewhere between 7 & 10pm (how's that for detail?) along with Roberto Cassan and Sophie's Smoking' Squeezebox. Of course, Aeronaut's is just a cool place to hang out, so it will all be fun. You should go!

item.title: Mar 18th-19th: Hillbilly Holiday, JPX
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two shows this weekend: first up, Hillbilly Holiday plays The Plough & Stars on Friday w/ Los Goutos, then on Saturday John Powhida International Airport hits Sally O'Brien's with The Nowhere Lights. Check it out: [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=295664815 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff artwork=none track=3744606689] [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=2830744941 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff artwork=none track=2702092512]

item.title: Apr 9th: 'Nauts & JPX at Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: Apr 13th - 17th: Jack Grace, Weisstronauts
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Several shows this week w/ Brooklyn baritone Jack Grace and The Weisstronauts: Wednesday, Apr 13th: Jack Grace Band @ Norey's, Newport, RI Friday, Apr 15th: Double Trouble: Jack Grace Band and the Weisstronauts @ The Plough & Stars, Cambridge, MA Saturday, Apr 16th: Jack Grace Band @ Stragebrew, Manchester, NH Sunday, Apr 17th: The Weisstronauts @ Midway Cafe, Jamaica Plain, MA -- early set (Weisstro-time is 6pm-ish), sandwiched by the the amazing Chandler Travis Philharmonic! https://soundcloud.com/jackgraceband/12-it-was-a-really-bad-year

item.title: Apr 28th: Rudds Reunion!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The Rudds reunite for the first night of the Abby Lounge Reunion at Sally O'Brien's! w/ The Drags, Heavy Stud, The Decals, The Charms, Triple Thick, Classic Ruins, and Red Zone Cuba. $12 cover, music starts at 7:30, and we're on last.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: See what happens when you type too fast?

item.title: May 17th: JPX @Lizard for J-Po's B-Day!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Special JPX show Tuesday at the Lizard Lounge -- John Powhida's Big Birthday Bash! How old? Well, it's getting tricky squeezing those "plus one plus one plus one..." tags into that Sake Bombing verse. Best to show up and do the math yourself. Doors at 8:30, show at 9pm, w/ Peter Mongomery (The Irresponsibles) opening. [bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=2830744941 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=2702092512]

item.title: May 27th-28th: Weisstronauts w/ Southern Culture on the Skids
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: The 'Nauts are privileged to open for Southern Culture on the Skids twice this weekend: Friday, May 27th at the Abbey Bar in Harrisburg, PA, and Saturday, May 28th at the Clementine Cafe in Harrisonburg, VA. We're also very excited to have Daria Grace of the Pre-War Ponies join us on bass both nights! If you're in the area, come check it out, or if not tell someone who is... https://youtu.be/LXL9WHFN5qc In closing, Daria would like to sing a tune with her band, just for you: [bandcamp width=100% height=120 album=2868754160 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff tracklist=false artwork=small]

item.title: June 3rd, 4th: Hillbilly Holiday, Weisstronauts
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Two shows this weekend, first up: Friday night Hillbilly Holiday plays Sally O'Brien's with Los Goutos and Nocturnal Adoration Society (Jimmy Ryan). We're on first, 9:30pm, $5 cover. Second up: The Weisstronauts play a rare afternoon gig at Atwood's Tavern on Saturday from 4-6pm. Hint: the food's great, so come on by for a late lunch or an early dinner.

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: I love how we’re all saying “rare afternoon gig” — funny, since three of our last five gigs have been in the afternoon! “Historically rare” may be a better term! :)

item.title: June 10th: JPX @Atwoods
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport plays Atwoods on Friday with the Tim Gearan Band. JPX @9pm, TGB @10pm, $7 cover. Just Say Yes.

item.title: June 20th: Junky Love @Midway
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: This Monday: Junky Love kicks your butt at the Miday Café in JP,  with co-kickers Old Soldiers & Lowman. You just gonna stand there or what? [soundcloud url="https://api.soundcloud.com/tracks/93310236" params="color=ff5500&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false" width="100%" height="166" iframe="true" /]

item.title: June 26th: Three Early Shows!
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
Three early shows this Sunday:
  1. John Powhida and JPX-"ish" (w/ special guests) play Making Waves for Autism at Sally O'Brien's. This is a benefit concert for Surfer's Healing -- a truly amazing free surf camp for children with autism. My son has attended before, and will be going again this year. Ask me about it at the show and I'll try to tell you the story without crying. The Dogmatics and Girl On Top also perform.  JPX plays @1:30 sharp! Hawaiian Shaved Ice Stand and prizes.
  2. Hillbilly Holiday plays Aeronaut Brewing at 2:30pm for the "Media Mixer" event. No cover charge, great venue, great beer, great hang!
  3. The Weisstronauts play Aeronaut Brewing at 3:30pm (finally, I get a moment's rest between sets). No cover, great venue... all that stuff plus more guitars (and less/no singing).
A bit of history about Surfer's Healing -- the story of the founder's childhood : https://youtu.be/uw4sUEV8lL0

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: Amazing! The trifecta! Get a good sleep buddy...See you tomorrow...

item.title: July 9th: JPX @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida Internation Airport tonight at Sally O's with Big Giant. 9pm, $5 cover. Side note -- unrelated, but related to everything: [bandcamp width=350 height=442 track=995109491 size=large bgcol=333333 linkcol=ffffff tracklist=false]

item.title: July 15th: Mick Mondo @ArtBeat
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Mick Mondo & Streaker play an early evening of dinosaur rock at ArtBeat in Davis Square, 7pm. Below, an artist rendering of the end of the Corporate Music Machine:

item.title: July 16th: JPX-ish, Hillbilly Holiday @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: July 24th: Hillbilly Holiday @Harpoon BBQ Festival
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Hillbilly Holiday plays Harpoon's annual BBQ Festival in Windsor, VT this Sunday. Barbecue & country tunes... ain't that worth a little drive?

item.title: July 26th: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
John Powhida International Airport bust out some new material (and yes, plenty of old ones) at Toad on this Tuesday with special guest Jef Charland on bass. 10pm -- no cover!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c9DgVOthlIA

item.title: Aug 23rd: Martha Bourne & JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: Aug 26th: Hillbilly Holiday @Gulu Gulu, Salem
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded:
Hillbilly Holiday hits the north shore on Friday, playing at Gulu Gulu Cafe in Salem. And it'll be Cryin' Time, 'cuz bassist Jeff Norcross is playing this one last show before leaving us to play drums in a new (yet-unnamed) project. So bring a hanky, and show up hungry and thirsty too -- it's more than a "Café". Music starts at 9pm, no cover.
[bandcamp width=100% height=42 album=528733353 size=small bgcol=333333 linkcol=0f91ff track=4189723710]

item.title: Sept 5th: Junky Love @Plough & Stars
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Amber Casares & band play at The Plough & Stars Monday at 10pm. Cool bar, great food, no cover!

item.title: Sept 7th, 9th & 10th: Jack Grace Band
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Three shows this coming week with the Jack Grace Band. First up,  Wendnesday, Sept 7th at Norey's in Newport, RI 8:30- 11:30pm, no cover charge. Second up, Saturday, Sept 10th at Strange Brew in Manchester, NH, 9pm - close. Last up, Sunday, Sept 11th we're at Toad, around 9pm. Special guest Ken Lafler (Francine , Weisstronauts) joins on bass (!) for the run, and Pete Weiss helps out on Sunday.

item.title: Sept 6th: J-Po Pian-o Tri-o
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida dusts off the Lizard Lounge upright this Tuesday, kicking off a trio of weekly trio gigs playing different arrangements of your favorite JPX tunes, along with some tunes you (... and I, and Jim Haggerty) have likely never heard. Two sets, 8:30 & 10:30, with special guests sandwiched in-between. For the first week, we'll have some of John's friends from the MFA in the house. We're playing for tips, and Jim's bringing his lucky spittoon...

item.title: Sept 13th: Chez-Po, Hillbilly Holiday
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Another double-duty Tuesday with Chez-Po (a.k.a. the John Powhida Piano Trio + guest synth wizard Paul Schultheis) playing a couple sets at the Lizard Lounge. We hit at 8:30 & 10:30, with a variety of Arlingtonian friends -- this week's theme -- playing the 9:30/sandwich slot. No cover charge! And if the word "sandwich" made you a bit hungry, well, you needn't take it on an empty stomach. Stop by the East Somerville Foodie Crawl first, where Hillbilly Holiday plays a set at the Aeronaut "Pop-up Bar" (45 Broadway). Lots of food & drink selections, and once again no cover charge. And if you help me schlep gear quickly from one gig to another I'll give you a ride and put you on the guest list at the Lizard.* * did you get that?

item.title: Sept 18th: Junky Love @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Amber Casares & band (a.k.a. Junky Love) hit Toad tonight for an early (and then a late) set at Toad, 9pm -- no cover charge. Hope to see you there!

item.title: Sept 24th: Weisstronauts @Tavern-at-end-of-World
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Saturday night the Weisstronauts find their way to the aptly-named Tavern at the End of the World in... well, you may need to look that one up. It's not that far away, really. We hit at 10pm, opening for Tsunami of Sound. No cover charge!

item.title: Oct 11th: Junky Love @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Amber Casares & band (a.k.a. Junky Love) return to Toad tonight with special guest Phil Aiken on keys. 10pm -- no cover charge!

item.title: Oct 14th: Handymen @Plough
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Special gig this Friday at The Plough & Stars with The Handymen (Charles Hansen, Chris Blue, Jim Haggerty), featuring special guest vocalists Marc Pinansky (Township) and Tom Baker (& the Snakes), playing "Soft & Hard": 30+ 70's tunes pulled outta-nothin'. Fun starts at 10pm!

item.title: Oct 30th: Weisstronauts & Hillbilly Holiday @Aeronaut Brewing
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Double-duty pre-halloween afternoon party at Aeronaut Brewing with my newly-healed, no-longer-scary index finger! Hillbilly Holiday starts at 2:30pm and The Weisstronauts take over from 5-7pm. No cover charge! ("before" pic)

item.title: Dec 10th, 11th: Weisstronauts Jubilee, Hillbilly Holiday, Junky Love
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat

item.title: Feb 23rd: Jack Grace @Thunder Road
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Tonight will be my first gig at Thunder Road, the little club that could (previously, couldn't) in Union Square, Somerville. It's bigger and cooler now, and to prove it Jack Grace is opening the evening with Hillbilly Holiday/Baby Ray guitarist Ken Lafler on bass. Not to be out-done, guitarist Pete Weiss will be performing with every band in New England (soon), starting tonight with aforementioned Brooklyn baddie* Jack Grace and then with trouble-troubadour Haley Thompson-King. The Mallet Brothers headline. Doors are 7pm, and we're on first, so... 7:30 or 8? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yrp8wghfcI8 \* hahahahahaha!

item.title: Apr 8th: JPX @Once Ballroom
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: A stripped-down/mini-lineup of John Powhida International Airport will play upstairs at Once Ballroom this Saturday for the Rock & Roll Rumble 2017 as part of the "Winner Dinner" series, where past crown-holders open the night upstairs at the Once Lounge before the main event. Originally slated as a guitar/drum duo, we're now to be joined by the honorable Peter Moore on keys (+vox & "left-hand bass"). Kitchen opens at 6pm, JPX plays 7:30-8pm, and R&RR Preliminary Night #6 kicks off at 9pm.  More info at the Once website.

item.title: April 15th: JPX @Sally O's
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: John Powhida International Airport lands at Sally O'Brien's in Somerville this Saturday, April 15. We're sharing the bill with our cool friends Nowhere Lights. Both bands play a wide stylistic range of material, so this'll be an interesting night. It's also Cheap Date Night -- and there's no shame in a cheap date, folks -- only $5 cover! Nowhere Lights open at 9:30, JPX at 10:30.

item.title: April 18th: JPX @Toad
item.dc:creator: kicksnarehat
item.content:encoded: Tonight! John Powhida International Airport full band plays at Toad, Cambridge at 10pm. Great club, cool bartenders, a friendly hang, and no cover charge -- what more could you ask for? Nothing. So don't ask -- question nothing -- just come.
